---
title: "Pédiatrie"
---

## GFRUP {#gfrup .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="gfrup">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.gfrup.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gfrup.png" alt="GFRUP">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.gfrup.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">GFRUP</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Groupe Francophone de Réanimation et Urgences Pédiatriques
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## GPTROP {#gptrop .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="gptrop">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfpediatrie.com/groupes-de-travail/gptrop" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gptrop.png" alt="GPTROP">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfpediatrie.com/groupes-de-travail/gptrop" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">GPTROP</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Groupe de Pédiatrie Tropicale — SFP
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## GPIP {#gpip .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="gpip">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.gpip.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gpip.png" alt="GPIP">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.gpip.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">GPIP</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Groupe de Pathologie Infectieuse Pédiatrique
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## PAP Pédiatrie {#pappediatrie .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="pappediatrie">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://pap-pediatrie.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pappediatrie.png" alt="PAP Pédiatrie">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://pap-pediatrie.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">PAP Pédiatrie</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Prescrire en Pédiatrie
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Pediadol {#pediadol .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="pediadol">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.pediadol.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pediadol.png" alt="Pediadol">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.pediadol.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Pediadol</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Association Pédiadol
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Pedi'Ara {#pediara .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="pediara">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://pediara.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pediara.png" alt="Pedi'Ara">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://pediara.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Pedi'Ara</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Pediara
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SFCE {#sfce .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfce">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfce.info/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfce.png" alt="SFCE">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfce.info/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFCE</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Française de lutte contre les Cancers et leucémies de l'Enfant
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SFP {#SFP .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="SFP">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfpediatrie.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfp.png" alt="SFP">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfpediatrie.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFP</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Française de Pédiatrie
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SOFREMIP {#sofremip .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sofremip">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sofremip.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sofremip.png" alt="SOFREMIP">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sofremip.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SOFREMIP</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Francophone de Rhumatologie et Maladies Inflammatoires Pédiatriques
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Pediadoc {#pediadoc .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="pediadoc">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://pediadoc.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pediadoc.png" alt="Pediadoc">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://pediadoc.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Pediadoc</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SFPEADA {#sfpeada .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfpeada">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://sfpeada.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfpeada.png" alt="SFPEADA">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://sfpeada.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFPEADA</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Laits {#laits .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfpeada">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.laits.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/laits.png" alt="Laits">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.laits.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Laits</a>
<div class="outil-source">
-
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
